summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 'Avec les Patriotes d'Israël' campaign website. All major features tested and working correctly. Site is fully functional with proper navigation, forms, and interactive elements.

minor_bugs.issue: Minor DOM attachment error during menu toggle stress testing - doesn't affect user experience

passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct hero slogan 'RUPTURE AVEC LA SOUMISSION'
All 5 navigation pages work (Accueil, Programme, La Liste, Soutenir, Contact)
Countdown timer displays correctly with 4 time units (Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds)
Programme page shows exactly 4 commitments as expected
Liste page displays Michel Ayach as 'Tête de Liste' with proper photo
Liste page shows Tel-Aviv section with 3 candidates
Liste page shows Haïfa section with 3 candidates
Currency toggle ILS/EUR works correctly on Soutenir page
All preset donation amounts (18, 50, 100, 200) display and function
Contact form validation works for all required fields (firstName, lastName, email, message)
Contact form success state displays after valid submission
Mobile menu toggle opens and closes properly
Social sharing buttons present and functional
All images load with proper alt text
26 elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
success_percentage: Frontend: 98% - All core functionality working, minor DOM attachment issue during stress testing
